programme.title: On Swift Horses
programme.desc: Muriel and her husband, Lee, begin a new life together after he returns home from the Korean War. However, their newfound stability gets upended by the arrival of Lee's charismatic brother, a wayward gambler with a secret past. Daniel Minahan - Director Daisy Edgar-Jones - Muriel Jacob Elordi - Julius Will Poulter - Lee Diego Calva - Henry Sasha Calle - Sandra.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: When his wickedness is challenged, super-villain Gru hatches a plan to steal the Moon. Enlisting three young orphans to help out, his dastardly plot is derailed when he begins to care for them. Chris Renaud - Director Pierre Coffin - Director Steve Carell - Gru Jason Segel - Vector Russell Brand - Dr. Nefario Julie Andrews - Gru's Mom.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Just as Gru settles into his new role as a suburban family man, the ultrasecret Anti-Villain League sends him on a mission to nab the perpetrator of a spectacular heist. Chris Renaud - Director Pierre Coffin - Director Steve Carell - Gru Kristen Wiig - Lucy Wilde Benjamin Bratt - Eduardo/El Macho Miranda Cosgrove - Margo.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After being fired from the `Anti-Villain League', Gru travels to Freedonia to meet his long-lost twin brother. Once united the siblings find themselves on a mission to take down a former child star from the 1980s, now out for revenge. Pierre Coffin - Director Kyle Balda - Director Steve Carell - Gru/Dru Kristen Wiig - Lucy Trey Parker - Balthazar Bratt Miranda Cosgrove - Margo.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: On a mission to find a new master to serve, three Minions meet Scarlet Overkill, the world's first female super-villain. Pierre Coffin - Director Kyle Balda - Director Sandra Bullock - Scarlet Overkill Jon Hamm - Herb Overkill Michael Keaton - Walter Nelson Allison Janney - Madge Nelson.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: An amnesiac is rescued at sea by the crew of an Italian fishing boat. Nearly dead, he carries nothing but the bullets in his back and the bank account number embedded in his hip. Although completely without identity or background, he possesses an array of extraordinary talents in fighting, linguistics and self-defence that speak of a dangerous past. Doug Liman - Director Matt Damon - Jason Bourne Franka Potente - Marie Helena Kreutz Chris Cooper - Alexander Conklin Clive Owen - The Professor Brian Cox - Ward Abbott.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Life never becomes easy for ex-CIA agent Jason Bourne, who is forced out of hiding, and must return to Europe to find out exactly what happened in his past. It's not easy, as he's being framed for murder and his old employers are leading the manhunt. Paul Greengrass - Director Matt Damon - Jason Bourne Franka Potente - Marie Brian Cox - Ward Abbott Julia Stiles - Nicky Karl Urban - Kirill.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Former CIA assassin Jason Bourne continues his quest to fill in memory gaps. When a `Guardian' reporter stumbles onto his trail, Bourne spies his chance to blow the Blackbriar black-ops brigade wide open. With some very powerful people intent on keeping their skeletons buried, he is in more danger than ever before, as his former paymasters send a series of elite killers after their reformed ex-colleague. Paul Greengrass - Director Matt Damon - Jason Bourne Julia Stiles - Nicky Parsons Joan Allen - Pamela Landy David Strathairn - Noah Vosen Scott Glenn - Ezra Kramer.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: Enhanced CIA assassin Aaron Cross faces a battle to survive when his CIA employers decide to do away with his programme. Tony Gilroy - Director Jeremy Renner - Aaron Cross Rachel Weisz - Dr. Marta Shearing Edward Norton - Byer Stacy Keach - Turso Dennis Boutsikaris - Terrence Ward.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Living off the grid for 10 years, former CIA operative Jason Bourne finds himself back in action battling a sinister network that utilises terror and technology to maintain unchecked power. Paul Greengrass - Director Matt Damon - Jason Bourne Tommy Jones - CIA Director Robert Dewey Alicia Vikander - Heather Lee Vincent Cassel - Asset Julia Stiles - Nicky Parsons.

With some very powerful people intent on keeping their skeletons buried, he is in more danger than ever before, as his former paymasters send a series of elite killers after their reformed ex-colleague. programme.title: Jason Bourne

programme.desc: They’re baaack! In the comedic sequel to.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer and habitual liar discovers that he is unable to tell a lie or withhold the truth about anything for 24 hours after his son makes a birthday wish that comes true.

programme.title: Mousehunt
programme.desc: Two brothers inherit a string factory and a decaying country home after the death of their father. After moving in, they learn that the house has historical importance, but they are constantly tormented by a mouse.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking
programme.desc: The first film to literally voice the concerns of a baby stars Kirstie Alley and John Travolta as single mother Mollie and cab driver James. As Molly tries to find the ideal father for her son Mikey, the child wonders: Could it be James?

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Too
programme.desc: Roseanne Barr voices the new addition to Kirstie Alley and John Travolta's family, and is just as opinionated as her toddler brother, voiced by Bruce Willis. Comedy sequel.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Now!
programme.desc: In this third film in the series, the Urbiaccos are going to the dogs. The canines must stop barking at each other to save the marriage of fun-loving parents James and Mollie.

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: An orphan wins the fatherly affections of a tough-talking billionaire - but the no-good owner of the orphanage and her brother are out to ruin the girl's chances of happiness and make a quick profit in the process.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: The Wizard of Oz
programme.desc: Young Dorothy Gale and her dog Toto are swept away by a tornado from their Kansas farm to the magical Land of Oz and embark on a quest with three new friends to see the Wizard, who can return her to her home and fulfill the others' wishes.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: An extraterrestrial finds a friend in 10-year-old Elliot, while members of a task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from outer space.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: Leaving a trail of capsized ships and demolished cities, a monstrous reptile known as Godzilla makes his way toward New York City.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: When two kids find and play a magical board game, they release a man trapped in it for decades - and a host of dangers that can only be stopped by finishing the game.

programme.title: Planes, Trains u0026 Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: About Last Night...
programme.desc: Struggling to balance their desire for sex and love, two single guys start a courtship that questions motives. Based on David Mamet's play Sexual Perversity in Chicago.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Goldie Hawn, Diane Keaton and Bette Midler take revenge on the husbands who dumped them for trophy wives. Girl power comedy with Maggie Smith and Sarah Jessica Parker.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A teenager moves from New Jersey to California, where he becomes the target of bullies from a martial-arts school, but an elderly man rescues him and teaches him the art of karate using unorthodox methods designed to give him a fighter's mindset.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: Summoned by his dying father, Miyagi returns to his homeland of Okinawa with Daniel after a 40-year exile. There he must confront an old rival, while Daniel falls in love and finds his own adversary.

programme.title: The Karate Kid III
programme.desc: An old enemy vows vengeance against martial arts student Daniel LaRusso and his teacher, Mr Miyagi. As they try to cope with the threat, they soon face difficult choices.

programme.title: The Next Karate Kid
programme.desc: In the fourth installment of this saga, Mr. Miyagi (Pat Morita) meets Julie Pierce (Hilary Swank), a problematic teenager to whom he agrees to teach karate so that she can overcome her rage, her pain, and learn how to be herself.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: Lloyd and Harry. One's dumb, the other's dumber. Two dunderheads stumble across a briefcase full of ransom money for kidnappers linked to the Mob.

programme.desc: It's time to kick off your Sunday shoes with remakes in this edition of the Cinema List. From Footloose to The Italian Job, revisit familiar favourites with a fresh twist.

programme.desc: Follows an undercover cop whose attempt to locate a boy and his mother leads him to a kindergarten where he poses as an unlikely teacher. A classic comedy with a sharp crime edge to it.

programme.desc: The Green Lanterns have little regard for humans, who have been unable to harness the powers of the ring each member wears. But Jordan, a test pilot, may be the corps' only hope when an enemy called Parallax threatens the universal balance of power.

programme.desc: A successful realtor is enjoying the fruits of his labor until he receives a warning from the dark past he left behind, which puts him on the run from his crime lord brother, who will do everything it takes to exact revenge.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: Trapped in a high-security safe house after a terrorist attack in downtown Los Angeles, six government agents realize they must survive not just the enemy outside, but the potential traitor among them.

programme.title: Twilight of the Warriors: Walled In
programme.desc: The notorious Kowloon Walled City serves as a fortified, lawless safe haven for gangs and refugees alike. But when a skilled underground fighter runs afoul of the most feared Triad boss in Hong Kong.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven's complex relationship with his ruthless father starts him down a path of vengeance, motivating him to become not only the greatest hunter in the world, but also one of its most feared.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: While on the run from the government, Venom and Eddie soon discover that aliens from Venom's planet have begun invading Earth, forcing them to prepare for a huge battle against the vicious creator and leader of the alien species.

programme.title: Shazam!
programme.desc: Billy Batson is a streetwise 14-year-old who can magically transform into the adult superhero Shazam. His powers soon get put to the test against the evil Dr. Thaddeus Sivana.

programme.title: Hellboy II: The Golden Army
programme.desc: A prince of the mythical world starts a rebellion against humanity in order to rule the Earth. Hellboy and his team must fight to stop him from locating the all-powerful Golden Army.

programme.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight
programme.desc: A car accident triggers a flashback that reminds amnesiac Samantha that she was a CIA assassin who was nearly killed eight years ago when a job went wrong. Now people in high places want to prevent Sam digging into the past.

programme.title: Venom

programme.desc: The misadventures of clueless model Derek Zoolander, who is hired to stop a cartel of political killers posing as male models.

programme.title: The Cinema List
programme.desc: It's time to kick off your Sunday shoes with remakes in this edition of the Cinema List. From Footloose to The Italian Job, revisit familiar favourites with a fresh twist.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: Strung
programme.desc: A talented violinist whose new job tutoring for an elite family turns into a battle for safety and sanity when she realises her past is linked to the family's patriarch.

programme.title: Sisu: Road to Revenge
programme.desc: The war is over, but revenge is not. In this sequel, Aatami seeks to rebuild his life, but the Red Army turns his journey into a bloody hunt by releasing the man who massacred his family.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: A CIA-trained assassin gathers fellow graduates from her secret childhood program to wipe out the organisation that created them, triggering a brutal counterattack from the CIA.

programme.title: Grand Prix of Europe
programme.desc: Edda, a young mouse with big dreams, seizes her chance to race in the Grand Prix disguised as her hero, Ed. She rises to the challenge of outwitting her rival's sabotage and proving that even the smallest racer can make the biggest impact.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants

programme.title: Life Hack
programme.desc: Kyle and his friends hack for fun, pranking online scammers. Seeking a bigger thrill, they target billionaire Don Heard through his daughter Lindsey's social media, stealing his cryptocurrency.

programme.title: Chinatown
programme.desc: A private investigator on a routine adultery case in 1930s Los Angeles uncovers an intricate web of lies, political corruption and murder.

programme.title: Maggie Moore(s)
programme.desc: Police Chief Sanders unravels a web of small-town lies while investigating the bizarre murders of two women with the same name. He meets and quickly falls for Rita, a nosy neighbour who's eager to help solve the mystery.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Sheriff Martin Brody finds history repeating when a pair of divers suddenly disappears and his investigation concludes that another dangerous shark has arrived, but he faces resistance from the Amity Town Council and the mayor himself.

programme.title: Ocean's Twelve
programme.desc: Danny Ocean and the rest of a band of thieves and conmen team up for another three huge heists, but this time they're in three different locations: Rome, London and Berlin.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Living off the grid for 10 years, former CIA operative Jason Bourne finds himself back in action battling a sinister network that utilises terror and technology to maintain unchecked power.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: The story follows an American family who visit a British family they met on holiday. What was supposed to be an idyllic weekend slowly unravels as the guests try to stay polite in the face of unpleasantness.

programme.title: Ocean’s Thirteen
programme.desc: When one of his close friends is betrayed in a business deal by a ruthless Vegas kingpin and suffers a medical breakdown, Danny Ocean gathers the group and puts a plan together to exact revenge by sabotaging the man's newest casino venture.

programme.title: Civil War
programme.desc: In a near-future dystopia, four embedded journalists race across a divided, hostile America in a rapidly escalating Civil War. While trying to stay alive, they aim to reach the White House to interview the president before he's overthrown.

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange
programme.desc: Stanley Kubrick's adaptation of Anthony Burgess' novel about Alex (Malcolm McDowell), an ultraviolent and vicious young hoodlum. Upon being captured, Alex undergoes therapy, but the treatment may prove to be as brutal as his crimes.

programme.title: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: A hard-drinking San Francisco cop investigates the case of a man murdered with an ice-pick, but his normally well-honed intuition starts letting him down as he falls for the sultry and manipulative chief suspect, the victim's former girlfriend.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky
programme.desc: The tale of a young New York City publishing magnate who finds himself on an unexpected roller-coaster ride of romance, comedy, suspicion, love, sex and dreams in a mind-bending search for his soul.

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: When an 8-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes, a series of past deaths and disappearances start to link together, forever altering a broken family's history.

programme.title: The Alto Knights
programme.desc: In an effort to have complete control, a dangerous mob boss makes plans to have his rival, another mob boss with political power, murdered, but when the mobster survives the assassination attempt, he is forced to make a difficult choice.

programme.title: Nightcrawler
programme.desc: When Louis Bloom, a con man desperate for work, muscles into the world of L.A. crime journalism, he blurs the line between observer and participant to become the star of his own story.

programme.title: Ocean’s Thirteen
programme.desc: When one of his close friends is betrayed in a business deal by a ruthless Vegas kingpin and suffers a medical breakdown, Danny Ocean gathers the group and puts a plan together to exact revenge by sabotaging the man's newest casino venture.

programme.title: Civil War
programme.desc: In a near-future dystopia, four embedded journalists race across a divided, hostile America in a rapidly escalating Civil War. While trying to stay alive, they aim to reach the White House to interview the president before he's overthrown.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: The true story of Captain Richard Phillips and the 2009 hijacking by Somali pirates of the U.S.-flagged MV Maersk Alabama, the first American cargo ship to be hijacked in two hundred years.

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: On one of the hottest days of August 1972, three amateur bank robbers plan to hold up a Brooklyn bank. Unfortunately, the supposedly uncomplicated heist suddenly becomes a bizarre nightmare as everything that could go wrong does.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: In a world where technology exists to enter the human mind through dream invasion, a highly skilled thief is given a final chance at redemption which involves executing his toughest job to date: Inception.

programme.title: Cellular
programme.desc: A random wrong number on his cell phone sends a young man into a high-stakes race against time to save a woman's life. Panicked voice on the other end of the cell phone, Ryan is thrown into a world of deception and murder.

programme.title: Falling Down
programme.desc: An unemployed defence worker, frustrated with the various flaws he sees in society, begins to psychotically and violently lash out against them.

programme.title: Lakewood
programme.desc: A mother mourning the loss of her husband lives with her teenage son in a small town. As she's on a jog in the woods, she finds her town thrown into chaos as a shooting takes place at her son's school.

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: When an 8-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes, a series of past deaths and disappearances start to link together, forever altering a broken family's history.

programme.title: The Plague
programme.desc: A socially awkward tween endures the ruthless hierarchy at a water polo camp as his anxiety spirals into psychological turmoil over the summer. Language/sex/mature themes.

programme.desc: When a man stumbles on a bloody crime scene containing a pickup truck loaded with heroin and two million dollars in irresistible cash, his decision to take the money sets off an unstoppable chain reaction of violence.

programme.title: Maine Pyar Kiya

programme.title: PL: West Ham v Burnley Hlts

programme.title: SNF: Chelsea v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: It's winless Wolves at Stamford Bridge for Chelsea on Saturday Night Football. The visitors parted ways with manager Vitor Pereira after last weekend's 3-0 defeat in west London. (08.11).

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v Bournemouth Hlts
programme.desc: Relinquishing unbeaten runs last weekend, Aston Villa and Bournemouth eye a return to form in this Super Sunday contest at Villa Park in the Premier League. (09.11).

programme.title: PL: Crystal Palace v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: Separated by a point in the Premier League, bitter rivals Crystal Palace and Brighton meet on Super Sunday. Palace returned to winning ways here last weekend, beating Brentford 2-0. (09.11).

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: Sean Dyche's next test as Forest boss comes on Super Sunday against Leeds. Forest had to settle for a point here last week in their search for a second top-flight win of the season. (09.11).

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: A Super Sunday encounter at the Gtech Community Stadium where a visiting Newcastle - without a win on the road in the Premier League in seven months - take on Brentford. (09.11).

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Nott'm Forest Hlts

programme.title: PL: Leeds v Aston Villa Hlts
programme.desc: Super Sunday begins from Elland Road, where Daniel Farke's Leeds host an Aston Villa side boosted by a comprehensive 4-0 victory over Bournemouth prior to the international break. (23.11).

programme.title: PL: Arsenal v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: Arsenal host bitter rivals Spurs at the Emirates, as Thomas Frank enters his first North London derby on Super Sunday. The Gunners have won the team's last three contests. (23.11).

programme.desc: Manchester United enter this Monday Night Football clash five Premier League games unbeaten as a returning David Moyes and Everton bid to dampen signs of progress at Old Trafford. (24.11).

programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: Beaten on Boxing Day, Newcastle stay on the road for a trip to Scott Parker's Burnley, who remain in the bottom three - six points adrift from Premier League safety. (30.12).

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Bournemouth Hlts
programme.desc: A Bournemouth side in freefall arrive at Stamford Bridge for a Premier League contest with an up-and-down Chelsea, who have only posted one win in their last five. (30.12).

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Forest and Everton meet for the second time this December. At the start of the month, Everton were resounding winners, putting three unanswered goals past Sean Dyche's Forest. (30.12).

programme.title: PL: West Ham v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: The pressure is on for West Ham in this pivotal Premier League clash with Brighton to close out the year. The Hammers are 18th, now without a win in seven after defeat to Fulham. (30.12).

programme.title: PL: Arsenal v Aston Villa Hlts
programme.desc: On a big night at the Emirates, league leaders Arsenal host an Aston Villa side on an 11-game winning run, the seventh of which coming against the Gunners earlier this month. (30.12).

programme.title: PL: Man Utd v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: Manchester United face Rob Edwards' winless Wolves in the Premier League. United are searching for back-to-back to wins at Old Trafford after beating Newcastle here on Boxing Day. (30.12).

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: The champions remain at Anfield after beating Wolves 2-1 here as Leeds come next for Liverpool. With ex-Evertonian Dominic Calvert-Lewin in the goals, Leeds are five games unbeaten. (01.01).

programme.title: PL: Crystal Palace v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: Three wins on the spin and Fulham are breathing down the necks of their London rivals Crystal Palace here, who tasted a third consecutive loss in the Premier League on Sunday. (01.01).

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: Bouncing back from consecutive Premier League defeats, another stern test awaits Spurs as Thomas Frank returns to the Gtech Community Stadium to face former side Brentford. (01.01).

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Manchester City's title bid meets a Sunderland-shaped obstacle as Regis Le Bris' impressive Black Cats take on Pep Guardiola's serial Premier League winners at the Stadium of Light. (01.01).

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v N. Forest Hlts
programme.desc: A chance for Villa to bounce back after a midweek drubbing at the Emirates as Unai Emery's side welcome 17th-placed Forest, who are aiming to avoid a fourth consecutive defeat. (03.01).

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Burnley Hlts
programme.desc: Brighton play host to Burnley at the Amex Stadium in the Premier League. (03.01).

programme.title: PL: Wolves v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Wolves play host to West Ham at Molineux in the Premier League. (03.01).

programme.title: SNF: Bournemouth v Arsenal Hlts
programme.desc: On Saturday Night Football, league leaders Arsenal - who ran riot in a 4-1 demolition midweek - begin 2026 at the Vitality, facing a Bournemouth side on a 10-game winless run. (03.01).

programme.title: PL: Spurs v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: It's Sunderland at home for Thomas Frank's Spurs after their first goalless draw in 137 Premier League games. The Black Cats held Manchester City to a draw in the week. (04.01).

programme.title: PL: Everton v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Coming away 2-0 winners from the City Ground, Everton are back at the Hill Dickinson Stadium for a Premier League encounter with Keith Andrews' in-form Brentford. (04.01).

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Liverpool Hlts
programme.desc: Unbeaten in four, Marco Silva's impressive Fulham provide another test for the champions Liverpool, who come from a goalless draw - the first of Arne Slot's Anfield tenure. (04.01).

programme.title: PL: Newcastle v C. Palace Hlts
programme.desc: Stemming the flow of three consecutive losses at home to Fulham, Palace go to Tyneside next to play Newcastle. The Magpies ended 2025 with a 3-1 win on the road to Burnley. (04.01).

programme.title: PL: Man City v Chelsea Hlts
programme.desc: Falling behind leaders Arsenal, what can Manchester City do in reply on Super Sunday against a Chelsea side coming to grips with the midweek dismissal of manager Enzo Maresca? (04.01).

programme.title: PL Stories: Pochettino's Spurs
programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's Tottenham; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers.

programme.title: Best of Federer
programme.desc: In what was Roger Federer's first Indian Wells triumph, and Tim Henman's last Masters 1000 final, the Swiss overcame the Briton in just over an hour to claim a first title in the desert.

programme.title: Federer v Agassi 2005
programme.desc: In the twilight of his career, Andre Agassi defied expectations by reaching the final at the 2005 US Open, coming up against Roger Federer. The American would go on to retire a year later.

programme.title: Best of Federer
programme.desc: Putting a stop to Rafael Nadal's remarkable clay-court run of 81 straight wins, world number one Roger Federer defeated his Spanish nemesis for the first time on the surface.

programme.title: Best of Federer
programme.desc: Overcoming a 21-year-old Andy Murray in the Scot's first Grand Slam final, the Swiss maestro Roger Federer celebrated an unprecedented fifth US Open in a row.

programme.title: Best of Federer
programme.desc: The only time Roger Federer defeated great rivals Rafael Nadal and Novak Djokovic to win a title, revisit the moment the Swiss reclaimed the ATP Finals crown at The O2 in London.

programme.desc: Cementing himself alongside Nadal with 20 Masters titles, Roger Federer defeated Czech star Tomá? Berdych in the 2012 final - the only time the Madrid Open was contested on blue clay.
